home.badge: Built on Stellar Testnet · Open Source
home.title: Money moves at the
home.subtitle: Finchippay Solution lets anyone send tiny payments across borders instant — for fractions of a cent. No bank. No borders. No friction.

instantSettlement.title: Instant Settlement
instantSettlement.desc: Stellar transactions confirm in 3–5 seconds. No waiting for bank transfers.

trulyGlobal.title: Truly Global
trulyGlobal.desc: Send XLM to anyone with a Stellar address, anywhere in the world.

microFees.title: Micro Fees
microFees.desc: Each transaction costs ~0.00001 XLM. Send $0.01 or $1,000 for the same fee.

nonCustodial.title: Non-Custodial
nonCustodial.desc: Your keys, your funds. We never touch your private key.

faq.heading: What is Stellar?
faq.subheading: A quick explainer for newcomers, with links to the official Stellar docs.
faq.whatIsStellarAnswer: Stellar is an open blockchain network for moving money quickly and with very low fees. It's designed for payments, remittances, and cross-border transfers that settle faster than traditional bank systems.
faq.whatIsXlmAnswer: XLM is Stellar's native asset. It's used to pay transaction fees and can also be sent directly like any other digital currency.
faq.howFastAnswer: Stellar transactions typically confirm in just a few seconds, which is why it feels much faster than a bank transfer.
faq.howMuchAnswer: Fees are tiny—usually a fraction of a cent. That makes Stellar useful for small payments where a bank transfer would be expensive or too slow.
faq.isItSafeAnswer: Stellar uses public-key cryptography, so only the owner of a wallet can sign transactions from it. As with any blockchain app, keeping your recovery phrase and private keys secure is essential.

home.installBannerDesc: Add to your home screen for quick access and offline support

dashboard.testnetWarning: You're on Testnet — funds are not real.
dashboard.fundingDescription: Your wallet is not funded yet. Click once to receive 10,000 XLM from Friendbot.
dashboard.friendbotSuccess: Success! 10,000 XLM has been credited to your wallet.
dashboard.exportDesc: Download your full transaction history as a CSV file.
dashboard.reserveWarningAt: XLM balance is at or below the minimum reserve
dashboard.reserveWarningNear: XLM balance is close to the minimum reserve
dashboard.reserveDetail: You hold {{balance}} XLM. Your account must keep at least {{minimum}} XLM reserved ({{subentries}} subentries × 0.5 XLM + 2 XLM base). Top up before submitting transactions to avoid tx_insufficient_balance.

sendPayment.title: Send Payment
sendPayment.accountDoesNotExistXlm: This account doesn't exist yet. Sending ≥ 1 XLM will create it.
sendPayment.accountDoesNotExist: This account doesn't exist on the Stellar network.
sendPayment.highValueWarning: High-value payment detected (≥ {{threshold}} XLM). Consider using the Multi-Signature panel below to require multiple approvals before funds are released.
sendPayment.successMessage: Your payment has been confirmed on the Stellar network.
sendPayment.resolutionFailed: Username resolution did not return a valid public key
sendPayment.invalidDestination: Enter a valid Stellar public key, federation address, or username.
sendPayment.destinationSelf: Destination cannot be your own wallet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your Stellar network preferences
settings.customUrlHint: Enter a custom Horizon server URL. Changes take effect immediately.
settings.turretsDescription: Deploy programmatic txFunctions with Freighter-signed authorization and server-side evaluation.
settings.mainnetWarning: Mainnet uses real XLM and real funds. Make sure you understand the risks and have backed up your keys. This action will disconnect your wallet.
settings.connectForUsername: Connect your wallet to register a username
settings.usernameFormat: Username must be 3-20 characters, alphanumeric only
settings.stellarNameDesc: Register a human-readable name (e.g. alice.xlm) that others can use to send you payments instead of your full address.
settings.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the application interface.
